title: Atom-Searcher: Enhancing Agentic Deep Research via Fine-Grained Atomic Thought Reward

defines.name: Atomic Thought
defines.definition: A thinking paradigm that decomposes reasoning into fine-grained functional units to support clearer and more in-depth reasoning.

defines.name: Atom-Searcher
defines.definition: An RL framework for agentic deep research that combines Atomic Thought with fine-grained atomic thought rewards and outcome rewards to improve search-and-reasoning performance.

problem: Outcome-based RL for agentic deep research suffers from gradient conflicts and reward sparsity, limiting optimization and generalization.
